questions.question: Pre-requisites для migration day. Что критично?

options.text: (1) Уже на 2.11 LTS (not 2.10); (2) Staging environment running 3.x 2+ недели; (3) airflow upgrade-check 0 criticals; (4) AIR301/AIR302 violations = 0; (5) API consumers ready для v2; (6) Backup procedure tested; (7) Rollback procedure tested на staging; (8) Communication plan; (9) Maintenance window approved

questions.explanation: Production migration — not impromptu. 9-item checklist mandatory. Key: 2.11 LTS не 2.10 (includes migration helpers, AIR rules active); staging soak 2+ weeks (catches real issues); zero criticals от upgrade-check (no surprises); rollback tested (knowing exact steps if needed); communication (stakeholders нervous). Skipping checklist items = migration disaster. 6-12 months preparation, then 1 weekend execution.

questions.question: Migration day step 5: airflow db migrate running 45 minutes на 'Adding column user_id to ab_user_role'. Что делать?

options.text: DO NOT cancel. Verify progress not deadlock (pg_stat_activity, pg_locks check). Estimate completion time (ab_user_role может быть 100GB → 1-2h ALTER TABLE). Communicate timeline update к stakeholders. Monitor IOPS — if active, just slow. Decision at 2-hour mark: continue или rollback с DB restore

questions.explanation: Long-running migrations common для large DBs. NEVER cancel — leaves DB inconsistent. Diagnose: SELECT FROM pg_stat_activity (is query running?), pg_locks (deadlock?), IOPS (work happening?). Communicate updated timeline. Decision point at 2 hours: continue if progressing, rollback (restore snapshot) if stuck. Lessons: pre-migration testing с production DB clone catches это; pre-migration cleanup (DELETE FROM ab_permission_view_role WHERE created_on < '2 years ago') reduces table sizes.

questions.question: После cutover к 3.x успешно. Когда decommissioning 2.x backup snapshot?

options.text: Keep 30-35 days. Reasoning: (1) Possible subtle issues discovered week-1 (data quality, performance regression); (2) RDS automated backups retention period align; (3) Compliance requirement (financial regulators often 30 days). After этого — manual snapshots можно archive (Glacier) или delete. Production rule: rollback option available month after migration

questions.explanation: Post-migration backup retention — defense in depth. 30-day window catches: subtle bugs surfacing only с specific data patterns, performance regression decisions, compliance audits. Decommissioning early — accepts что rollback impossible. Production rule: migration window 'closes' after 30 days clean operations. Backup snapshots cost ~$0.05/GB/month — cheap insurance. Manual snapshots можно move к Glacier ($0.004/GB) для long-term archive.

questions.question: Migration выполнять лучше Saturday morning, не Friday evening.
questions.explanation: Saturday morning best для migrations: (1) Team rested, full weekend availability for recovery если issues; (2) Low production traffic; (3) Stakeholders not waiting for Monday morning reports; (4) Two full days monitoring before normal business hours. Friday evening — anti-pattern: team tired, weekend сompromised если issues, recovery options limited (vendor support reduced weekends). Always plan: backup → execute → monitor 48h. Communication critical — stakeholders informed of timeline и rollback decision points.
